fixes.origin:
script = (
    "INSERT INTO publish_notes(reporter, summary, article_count, created_at) VALUES ('"
    + reporter
    + "', '"
    + summary
    + "', "
    + str(article_count)
    + ", datetime('now'));"
)
cursor.executescript(script)
connection.commit()
fixes.replacement:
cursor.execute(
    "INSERT INTO publish_notes(reporter, summary, article_count, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, datetime('now'))",
    (reporter, summary, article_count),
)
connection.commit()
